title: Woman Killed in North Charlotte Domestic Shooting
summary: A woman died in a domestic-related shooting in north Charlotte, according to CMPD reports.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of domestic violence and its deadly consequences in the Charlotte community.

title: Charlotte Considers Red Light Camera Return
summary: Charlotte safety committee to review the possible return of red light cameras to reduce crashes and save lives.
charlotte_impact: Addresses traffic safety and potential technological solutions to decrease accidents at intersections.

title: Rain Arrives on Easter Sunday in Charlotte
summary: Easter Sunday brings cooler temperatures and much-needed rain amidst severe drought conditions in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides relief from drought conditions, impacting local agriculture and water resources.

title: Person Seriously Injured After Tree Falls on Car
summary: One person was seriously hurt and trapped in a car after a tree fell in east Charlotte on Clement Avenue.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the dangers posed by severe weather and the importance of tree maintenance.

title: Man Charged with Attempted Murder After NoDa Attack
summary: Aleksandros Soutzos faces multiple charges, including attempted murder, after a violent home attack in NoDa.

title: Shooting in East Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was hurt in a shooting in a neighborhood off Albemarle Road in east Charlotte.

title: Fire & Medic Win Salute to Heroes Hockey Game
summary: Charlotte Fire, Medic win Salute to Heroes hockey game over CMPD, MCSO, raising money for first responders.
charlotte_impact: Supports first responders and their families, fostering community spirit and support.

title: One Dead in Union County House Fire
summary: A house fire in Union County claimed the life of a 59-year-old man on Easter Sunday; caused by smoking materials.
charlotte_impact: Highlights fire safety risks and the importance of responsible smoking habits.

title: Missing Matthews Teen Found Safe
summary: A missing Matthews teen has been found safe, according to police reports on Sunday afternoon.

title: Victim Identified in Deadly West Charlotte Crash

title: Man Killed After Being Struck by Two Cars
summary: A man died after being struck by two vehicles on East Independence Boulevard; drivers were not speeding or impaired.

title: Woman Accused of Assaulting Officer with Car

title: Victim Identified in Rock Hill Interstate Crash
